Track.Name: Night Circuit
Track.Description: Brooding electronic score built on a relentless 4-on-the-floor kick, layered arps, and a growling bass drone, Tension rises in hypnotic 16th-note patterns and filtered noise swells; mid-track break strips to a single pulsing synth before everything slams back in with distorted stabs and widening stereo pads, Cold, cinematic energy arc; designed for seamless looping in a dark club-ready mix, electronic, moody, rhythmic
